menu_options.scan: Scan a network range for printers

manual.title: Configure SNMP Printer
manual.description: Enter details for your SNMP-enabled printer

scan.title: Scan Network for Printers
scan.description: Enter a network range in CIDR notation to search for SNMP-enabled printers.

scan_select.title: Select Printer
scan_select.description: Found {count} printer(s) on the network. Select one to add.

error.invalid_subnet: Invalid network range. Use CIDR notation, for example 192.168.1.0/24.
error.subnet_too_large: That network range is too large to scan. Choose a smaller range.
error.no_printers_found: No SNMP printers were found in that range.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the printer. Check your settings and ensure SNMP is enabled.

abort.not_printer: The discovered device is not an SNMP-enabled printer

init.title: Update SNMP Printer Settings
init.description: Update the configuration for this printer

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect with the new settings. Check your configuration.

display_text.name: Display Text
display_text.description: Display text on the printer's screen (if supported)

text.name: Text
text.description: Text to display on the printer
